image:image.image:title: Slave Duck Designer Toy by Dirtcake Studio
image:image.image:caption: Black leather aesthetic industrial rubber duck designer toy by Dirtcake Studio.

image:image.image:title: The Kiss Designer Toy by Dirtcake Studio
image:image.image:caption: Retro-glam resin sculpture designer toy with heart-shaped kiss detail by Dirtcake Studio.

image:image.image:title: Züreyder Mechanical Beast Designer Toy by Dirtcake Studio
image:image.image:caption: Industrial post apocalyptic tank-beast designer toy giraffe with weathered paint and grit by Dirtcake Studio.

image:image.image:title: Mister Giraffe Leisure Figure Designer Toy by Dirtcake Studio
image:image.image:caption: Designer toy giraffe with sweatband, slides, white socks and ice cream cone reminding a happy sunny day by Dirtcake Studio.

image:image.image:title: Sneaky Snake Designer Toy by Dirtcake Studio
image:image.image:caption: Vibrant reptile figure with jagged blade and cut tail detail by Dirtcake Studio.

image:image.image:title: Good Boy Resin Dog Designer Toy by Dirtcake Studio
image:image.image:caption: Luxury obedience dog designer toy with oversized industrial zipper detail by Dirtcake Studio.

image:image.image:title: Da Bomb Designer Toy Figure by Dirtcake Studio
image:image.image:caption: High-energy character designer resin toy with red shades and sneakers by Dirtcake Studio.

image:image.image:title: Manduck Action Figure Designer Toy by Dirtcake Studio
image:image.image:caption: Underground aesthetic man-duck action figure in leather harness and pants by Dirtcake Studio.

image:image.image:title: Real Friend Action Figure Designer Toy by Dirtcake Studio
image:image.image:caption: Raw and dirty style resin action figure designer toy by Dirtcake Studio.

image:image.image:title: Züreyder Hot Rod Upgrade Kit by Dirtcake Studio
image:image.image:caption: Marauder Hot Rod style chrome exhaust and engine parts upgrade kit for Zureyder by Dirtcake Studio.
